overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a flooded waterfront promenade in Night City, transitioning through covered urban areas beneath elevated highways, and ending at a street crossing. The scene features futuristic cyberpunk architecture with neon signage, clear afternoon lighting, and sparse pedestrian activity.

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade observing the flooded district and distant skyline

partially submerged industrial buildings and barriers in the water
metal railing along the edge of the flooded waterfront
tables and chairs arranged along the promenade for outdoor seating
tall futuristic tower with illuminated signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit waterfront promenade with flooded industrial structures visible in the water to the right. The camera moves forward along the concrete walkway, passing outdoor seating areas, with a large green elevated highway structure dominating the upper portion of the frame and a neon-lit skyscraper visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with billboards

events.description: moving under the elevated highway into a partially covered commercial area with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway past commercial billboards and advertising displays

entered.detail: massive concrete support structure for the elevated highway overhead
large illuminated advertising screens mounted on building facades
modern building with curved glass exterior visible in the background
tall standalone advertisement display featuring purple branding

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath the elevated highway into a semi-covered commercial walkway. Digital billboards and advertisements line the left side of the path, while the concrete infrastructure of the overpass creates partial shade. The flooded waterfront falls behind as the environment transitions to an urban commercial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed underpass with medical clinic and neon signs

events.description: entering deeper underpass area with artificial neon lighting and heavy shadows

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass toward the medical clinic with green neon signage

notable_agents.action: person in casual clothing walking ahead in the underpass toward the exit

entered.detail: illuminated green cross symbol indicating a medical clinic or pharmacy
storefront with glass doors and medical signage beneath the green cross
underside of the elevated highway forming a low ceiling over the walkway

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes more enclosed as the camera moves deeper beneath the overpass. A medical clinic with a prominent green neon cross becomes visible on the left. The lighting shifts to artificial neon and shadow, with the concrete ceiling of the highway overhead. A lone pedestrian walks ahead toward the distant light of the underpass exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with restaurant and street crossing

events.description: exiting the underpass into a sunlit plaza with a distinctive yellow restaurant building
approaching street crossing with vehicles and pedestrians visible ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza and approaching the street intersection with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street ahead of the camera
silver sedan driving along the road to the right

entered.detail: distinctive yellow and green building with outdoor seating and umbrellas
blue patio umbrellas shading tables outside the restaurant
multi-lane street with vehicles and crosswalk markings
tall industrial buildings with smokestacks visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the underpass into a bright open plaza dominated by a distinctive yellow corner restaurant with outdoor seating. The environment transitions from enclosed shadow to open sunlight. The camera approaches a street crossing where pedestrians are walking and vehicles are driving by, with industrial buildings visible in the hazy background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit waterfront promenade into the shadowed depths of an urban underpass before emerging into a bright city plaza. It begins along a concrete walkway beside flooded industrial structures, moving forward under a massive green elevated highway with a neon skyscraper looming in the distance. As the camera glides beneath the overpass, the open waterfront falls away and the scene shifts into a semi-covered commercial corridor lined with digital billboards and artificial neon lighting. The environment becomes increasingly enclosed, passing a medical clinic marked by a green neon cross, before the camera follows a lone pedestrian toward the distant light of the exit. Finally, the view breaks out from the shadows into a bright open plaza featuring a yellow corner restaurant and a busy street crossing with vehicles and industrial buildings in the hazy background.
